solutions.solution: (c) As, POLICE : SROLEH with pattern shown in diagram. Similarly, AROUND : DURXQG with same pattern. ∴ ? = AROUND
(c) As 'Hair' are present on 'Head', similarly, fingers are present in 'Hand.'
(c) As 'Running' is the higher form of 'Walking', similarly, 'Storm' is the higher form of 'Wind'.
(c) As, 'King' sits on the 'Throne', in the same way 'Rider' sits on the 'seat'.
(c) As, F - L M with pattern -5|-5|-5. Similarly, M I L K with pattern -5|-5|-5. H D G F. ∴ ? = HDGF
(c) As, H C M with pattern -2|-2|-2. Similarly, S G D with pattern -2|-2|-2. Q E B. ∴ ? = QEB
(c) As, by 'Tobacco', we can have 'Cancer', similarly by 'Mosquito', we can have 'Malaria'.
(c) If we move from West, clockwise through 135°, we get North-East direction. Similarly, if we move from South, clockwise through 135°, we get North-West direction.
(c) As, 11 14 17 20 → 12 15 18 21 KNQT → LORU with pattern +1|+1|+1|+1. Similarly, 1 4 7 10 → 2 5 8 11 ADGJ → BEHK with pattern +1|+1|+1|+1
(c) As, 17 16 18 19 → 10 9 11 12 QPRS → JIKL with pattern +3|+5|+5|+3. Similarly, TUWV → MNPQ with pattern 20 21 23 22 → 13 14 16 15. ∴ ? = MNPQ
(c) As, 23 18 9 20 5 → 23 18 15 14 7 WIRO → WRONC with pattern +13|+13|+13|+13|+13. Similarly, ETYVS → FAZAD with pattern 5 20 25 22 19 → 6 1 26 1 4. ∴ 10 5 22 7 18 → 10 5 9 2 20
(c) As, TNGP → 20 14 7 16 with pattern shown. Similarly, LPDT → 12 16 4 20 with same pattern. ∴ ? = 1216420

(c) As, PST with values 16 + 19 + 20 = 55 and digits sum of 55 = 5 + 5 = 10. Digits sum of 10 = 1 + 0 = 1. Similarly, NPR with values 14 + 16 + 18 = 48. Digits sum of 48 = 4 + 8 = 12 and digits sum of 12 = 1 + 2 = 3. ∴ ? = 3
(c) As, 1 2 3 4 → 2 1 4 3 DARE → ADER with pattern shown. Similarly, R E 3 4 → E R 4 3 RERKE with pattern. ∴ ? = ERKE
